properties.verseOrder: V1 V2 C3 V4 C3 V5 C3 V6 C3

verse.name: V1
V2
verse.lines: And though these are days of great trials, Of famine and darkness and sword; Still we are the voice in the desert, crying, Prepare ye the way of the Lord.

verse.name: C3
verse.lines: Behold He comes, riding on the clouds, Shining like the sun, at the trumpet's call; Lift your voice, it's the year of Jubilee, Out of Zion's hill Salvation comes.

verse.name: V4
V5
verse.lines: And these are the days of the harvest, The fields are all white in the world; And we are the laborers in Your vineyard, Declaring the Word of the Lord.

verse.name: V6
verse.lines: /: Who Was and Who Is And Who Is to Come… :/ To come, to come.
